productDisplayName: Franco Leone Men Formal Brown Formal Shoes
description: Cast a timeless impression with this pair of franco leone pointed toe oxfords. Give your formal wear a twist of style with this leather shoe and revel in the comfort of easy fashion.UpperLeather upper for absolute comfort and stylePointed toe design for styleSuede inner lining on the forefoot region for all-day sweat-free comfortLace-up system for a snug, customised FitMidsoleLeather footbed for absolute all-day sweat-free comfortOutsoleTPU outsole with geometrical patterned lugs on the forefoot and textured on the back heel for absolute grip on smooth surfacesRaised heel for ergonomic comfortshoe careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtUse a branded leather conditioner to maintain shoe shineDo not store in direct sunlight
